title: Day 1 Forecast Discussion
discussion:
Moderate to Strong scattered thunderstorms are expected for Central Europe on 21st June 2026, with the highest risk being a MDRT.

MDRT
C-W Germany & W Czechia
Strong thunderstorms accompanied by very strong wind gusts and big hail are expected for both countries. Large storm system is expected to move from Germany to the Czech Republic by evening.
This day will be much different from yesterdays (20/06/26) scenario, as the storms will not be that scattered, but rather one single system.

ENHD
SE-N Hungary, E-C Slovakia & S Poland
Moderate thunderstorms are expected mostly all day in Slovakia, moving to Hungary during later hours of the day. These storms may bring heavy rain, and maybe even local floodings.
